acknowledged_affected_count.description: Required for a batch (audience) workflow: the current affected-user count from workflows-blast-radius that you showed the user. Each firing re-broadcasts to the audience at that time; rejected if it no longer matches. Not needed for a 'schedule' trigger (person-less — no audience).

rrule.description: iCalendar RRULE (e.g. 'FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1'). Must produce occurrences at most once per hour.

starts_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime the schedule starts from.

variables.description: Optional {key: value} variable overrides merged with the workflow defaults on each run.

workflow_id.description: ID of the batch or schedule workflow to attach the schedule to.
